titleStmt.title: SII 11.190: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 190. (B.K. No. 36 of 1928-29.) ARASIBĪḌI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB STANDING ON A HILL TO THE RIGHT OF THE JAIN Basti.

summary.p: This inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 31, Vyaya, Pausha, ba. 9, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1106, December, 19, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·92; the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, however, occurred on the 25th. The epigraph registers a gift of a portion of the income derived from the achchu-pannāya cess made by the Mahāpradhāna and Daṇḍanāyaka Mādhava-Bhaṭṭa to the satra attached to the temple of Vishṇu in the Brahmapurigēri of the rājadhāni Vikramapura. The gift is stated to have been made with the permission of the Mahāprachaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka Anantapāḷa-Daṇḍanāyaka, when Mādhava-Bhaṭṭa was in charge of the achchu-pannāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastarājyabharanirūpita mahāmātyapadavīvirājamāna mānōnnata prabhumaṁ trōtsāhaśakti
trayasaṁpannarappa śrīmanmahāpradhāna naccupannāyadadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ daṁḍanāyakaṁ mā dhavabhaṭṭaru
vritta . kuladoḷu peṁpinoppinoḷu vibhavadoḷu sauṁdaryyadoḷ dhairyyadoḷu chaladoḷ satyado ḷaṇminoḷ
patihitavyāpāradoḷ nītiyoḷ baladoḷ mādhavabhaṭṭanaṁ danujanoḷ dānakke kō ḍiṭṭanaṁ kalikālēya
kaḷankapaṁkiḷara nentuṁ pōlisalu ballarē . śrīmanmahāpradhāna daṁḍanāyakaṁ mādhavabhaṭṭa raccupannāya
maṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadi nāḷuttamiḻdu śrīmanmahāpracaṁ2ḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ bhāṇasa verggaḍe Anantapāḷa
daṁḍanāyakaṁge binna paṁgeydu śrīrājadhāni vikramapurada brahmapurigēriya viṣṇugri
hadalliya satrakke biṭṭa dharmmameṁteṁdaḍe Alli koysideleya pēṟinge tamma pannāya da suṁ
kadoḷage biṭṭa vīsa 10 poṟege vīsa 5 paṇavinelege vīsa 1 Iṁtī puṭṭidartthadalu nityānī
ka pannirvvaru brāhmaṇa ruṇbantāgi śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavariṣada 31 neya vyayasaṁvatsa
rada pauṣya bahuḷa 9 mi saumyavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇadalu biṭṭarī dharmmamaṁ
svadharmmadalu rakṣisidavaru vāraṇāsiya loṁdu kōṭi kavileya naḷaṁkārasahi
ta vanibaru vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgoṭṭa phalama neyduvarintī dharmmama naḷida
varāṣṭhānada lanitu kavileyuma naniba rbrāhmaṇaruma naḷida dōṣama nayduvaru
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānē tān bhā
ginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatā rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdharāḥ ṣaṣṭhivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
